title: Better Lich Scepters
description: Strengthened the scepter of Twilight Lich
body:
Now, when using the Twilight Scepter, When lurking, consume flame powder and launch fireballs. Cooling 6S
Using the Zombie Scepter will consume your experience, don't be discouraged! Because you can add weapons and armor to the servant, and feed him an exanimate_ essay for stronger reinforcement.
